changeSet.author: openelis-bacteriology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description = 'bacteriology test section' AND english = 'Bacteriology'

changeSet.comment: Create localization entry for Bacteriology test section

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Bacteriology'

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description = 'bacteriology test section' AND english = 'Bacteriology' LIMIT 1)

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'blood'

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Blood' AND description = 'sampleType name' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1)

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'urine'

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Urine' AND description = 'sampleType name' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1)

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'stool'

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Stool' AND description = 'sampleType name' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1)

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'CSF (Cerebrospinal Fluid)' AND description = 'sampleType name'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'csf (cerebrospinal fluid)'

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'CSF (Cerebrospinal Fluid)' AND description = 'sampleType name')

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Pleural Fluid' AND description = 'sampleType name'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'pleural fluid'

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Pleural Fluid' AND description = 'sampleType name')
